creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
* Dmitry Marakasov (amdmi3@amdmi3.ru) wrote:

Here's improved patch with better pkg-message handling.
Please use it instead.

--- freera.diff begins here ---
diff -ruN freera.orig/Makefile freera/Makefile
--- freera.orig/Makefile	Tue Apr 10 01:38:56 2007
+++ freera/Makefile	Tue Apr 10 01:55:45 2007
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	freera
-PORTVERSION=	070122
+PORTVERSION=	070328
 CATEGORIES=	games
 MASTER_SITES=	SF
 DISTNAME=	${PORTVERSION}_freera++_src
@@ -20,6 +20,9 @@
 SCONS_BUILDENV=	${SCONS_ENV} SDL_CONFIG=${SDL_CONFIG}
 
 WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/freera++
+
+PKGMESSAGE=	${WRKDIR}/pkg-message
+SUB_FILES=	pkg-message
 
 post-patch:
 	@${MV} ${WRKSRC}/SConstruct ${WRKSRC}/SConstruct.orig
diff -ruN freera.orig/distinfo freera/distinfo
--- freera.orig/distinfo	Tue Apr 10 01:38:56 2007
+++ freera/distinfo	Tue Apr 10 01:39:57 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (070122_freera++_src.tar.gz) = 65aac34793ca0e019bab93081f9bbd6e
-SHA256 (070122_freera++_src.tar.gz) = e5e1fbea4f290a632e905a767f72a2392bc6c47922b0bdb1a925fcc1ccb78005
-SIZE (070122_freera++_src.tar.gz) = 440095
+MD5 (070328_freera++_src.tar.gz) = 9fc417abd51f028848ae43dc29964ada
+SHA256 (070328_freera++_src.tar.gz) = 3825f1aed204e7258ff4d2045b7f954e19b3107d81e7eed8a27ddf903a2022d3
+SIZE (070328_freera++_src.tar.gz) = 456927
diff -ruN freera.orig/files/pkg-message.in freera/files/pkg-message.in
--- freera.orig/files/pkg-message.in	Thu Jan  1 03:00:00 1970
+++ freera/files/pkg-message.in	Tue Apr 10 02:24:47 2007
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+==========================================================================
+
+FreeRA requires original .mix files from Red Alert. Copy those files from
+Red Alert CD's to %%PREFIX%%/share/freera/data/mix/ directory:
+
+  main.mix
+  redalert.mix
+
+Both files can be found on either Red Alert CD. Both CDs have the maps
+for both campaigns but only the videos for one.
+
+==========================================================================
diff -ruN freera.orig/pkg-message freera/pkg-message
--- freera.orig/pkg-message	Tue Apr 10 01:38:56 2007
+++ freera/pkg-message	Thu Jan  1 03:00:00 1970
@@ -1,12 +0,0 @@
-==========================================================================
-
-FreeRA requires original .mix files from Red Alert. Copy those files from
-Red Alert CD's to ${PREFIX}/share/freera/data/mix/ directory:
-
-  main.mix
-  redalert.mix
-
-PS. Both files can be found on either Red Alert CD. Both CDs have
-    the maps for both campaigns but only the videos for one.
-
-==========================================================================
--- freera.diff ends here ---

-- 
Best regards,
  Dmitry Marakasov               mailto:amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
